# Accessibility Test Scenarios - Cart Icon Feature

**Generated By**: Microsoft 365 Copilot  
**Date**: January 28, 2026  
**Total Scenarios**: 20  
**Test Type**: Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 Level AA)  
**Priority**: Critical  

---

## Instructions

Use **Prompt 5** from the Test Scenario Generation document in M365 Copilot:

```
Generate 20 accessibility test scenarios for the Cart Icon feature to ensure WCAG 2.1 Level AA compliance.

**Focus Areas:**

**1. Keyboard Navigation (5 scenarios)**
- Tab key navigates to cart icon
- Enter key activates cart icon (navigates to cart)
- Focus indicator clearly visible on cart icon
- Tab order logical in header (logo → nav links → cart icon)
- Escape key behavior (if any modals/overlays)

**2. Screen Reader Support (5 scenarios)**
- Cart icon has proper ARIA label: "Shopping cart with X items"
- Badge count announced by screen reader
- Cart state changes announced (item added/removed)
- Toast notifications announced to screen readers
- Screen reader can access all cart functionality

**3. Visual Accessibility (5 scenarios)**
- Sufficient color contrast for cart icon (WCAG 4.5:1 for text, 3:1 for UI)
- Sufficient color contrast for badge (white text on red background)
- Badge readable at 200% zoom (no overlap or cut-off)
- Icon distinguishable in dark mode (adequate contrast)
- Focus indicators have sufficient contrast (3:1 minimum)

**4. Motion and Interaction (3 scenarios)**
- Toast animations respect prefers-reduced-motion setting
- Badge animations respect prefers-reduced-motion
- No auto-playing animations that can't be controlled

**5. Touch Targets (2 scenarios)**
- Cart icon touch target minimum 44x44px (mobile)
- Cart icon has sufficient spacing from adjacent elements

For each scenario, include:
- **WCAG Success Criterion**: Reference specific criterion (e.g., 2.1.1 Keyboard, 1.4.3 Contrast)
- **Testing Method**: How to test (manual, automated tool, screen reader)
- **Expected Screen Reader Announcement**: For screen reader scenarios

Use the markdown table format with additional columns:

| Test ID | Test Name | WCAG Criterion | Priority | Preconditions | Test Steps | Expected Results | Testing Method |

Test ID format: TS-CART-A-001 through TS-CART-A-020 (A = Accessibility)

Generate all 20 accessibility test scenarios with WCAG mappings.
```

## Testing Tools

- **Automated**: axe DevTools, Lighthouse, WAVE
- **Screen Readers**: NVDA (Windows), VoiceOver (macOS/iOS), JAWS
- **Contrast Checkers**: WebAIM Contrast Checker, axe DevTools
- **Manual Testing**: Keyboard-only navigation, zoom testing
